Frequently Asked Questions
1. Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 20 July 2026.
2. Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Exam Date?
The Examination will be conducted in As Per Schedule .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 19 August 2026.
6. What is the last date to Pay application fee ?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 19 August 2026 .
7. How can I apply for Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Exam?
JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Online Form 2026 .
tables: Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 326 Post

Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) JILCCE has released the Notification for the recruitment of JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Recruitment 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 20/07/2026 to 19/08/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in JSSC JILCCE Inter Lavel Recruitment 2026.

Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) Jharkhand JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Combined Recruitment  2026 Jharkhand JSSC Advt. No. 03/2026 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 20/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 19/08/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 19/08/2026 Correction Date : 21-23 August 2026 JSSC JILCCE Exam Date : As per Schedule Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / OBC / Other State : 100/- SC / ST : 50/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Online Form 2026 Notification : Age Limit Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 35 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per JSSC JILCCE Inter Level Examination Rules Advt. No. 03/2026.
